title: Asha
lede: A cognitive scaffold for Claude Code. Persistent identity, session memory, and domain-specific plugins for development, creative writing, research, and automation.

title: Thallus
lede: Decentralized AI agent infrastructure. Local-first, cryptographically signed, no central authority.

etymology.gloss: biology — the undifferentiated vegetative body of lichens and fungi

title: The Hush
lede: A cosmic horror novel in long-form revision. Reality stays mundane; the protagonist's experience of it does not.

etymology.gloss: Middle English husht — imitative. The word is the noise.

title: botcore
lede: Python bot framework with Claude SDK integration. Discord sessions, command registry, conversation state across messages.

etymology.gloss: robot (← Czech robota: forced labor, R.U.R., 1920) + Latin cor: heart

title: termart
lede: Generative art for the terminal. Bonsai trees, animated visualizations, ratatui in Rust.

etymology.gloss: Latin terminus — boundary. The edge of the screen as canvas.

title: CC-Helpers
lede: Two small tools for managing Claude Code sessions: a TUI session manager and a virtual-office visualizer.

etymology.gloss: Claude Code, of course. The 'helpers' is doing a lot of work.

title: RPG dice tools
lede: Three small Python libraries for tabletop RPG bots: dice expressions, weighted random selection, card draws.

etymology.gloss: role-playing game; the abbreviation crystallized around D&D in the mid-1970s

title: Minecraft datapacks
lede: Two datapacks for Minecraft 1.21: quality-of-life crafting recipes, and a hunter-vs-hunted PvP minigame.

etymology.gloss: Old English cræft — skill, strength, cunning. Burrow plus know-how.

title: mplay
lede: TUI MPRIS music client. Rust + ratatui.

etymology.gloss: the m is for MPRIS (Media Player Remote Interfacing Specification, 2006); now lowercase humility
